s: In 2017, Bobby Wahl suited up for OAK as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.700, WHIP 1.570, SO 8, WAR 0.100.
Changed teams after the previous season (OAK -> NYM).
In 2018, Bobby Wahl suited up for NYM as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 10.130, WHIP 2.440, SO 7, WAR -0.200. Notable context: Joined NYM.
Changed teams after the previous season (NYM -> MIL).
In 2020, Bobby Wahl suited up for MIL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 11.570, WHIP 1.710, SO 1, WAR -0.200. Notable context: Joined MIL.
